name: mapjson-pipeline
description: Data pipeline for mapjson.com — processes Natural Earth shapefiles into topojson for the API

scripts.pipeline-postal: npm run download-postal && npm run process-postal && npm run build-catalog
scripts.pipeline: npm run download && npm run download-mledoze && npm run process && npm run build-props && npm run build-catalog
scripts.pipeline-iso: npm run download-iso && npm run process-iso && npm run upload
